backstory.original: Orkira Illdrex is a gold dragonborn from the Nentir Vale, where she grew up nurturing a love of healing and fire. Between a strange life filled with monsters, Gods, time and multiplanar travel, death, the destruction of worlds and the saving of others, Orkira has survived and adapted to deal with any situation with a motto of 'One problem at a time.'
backstory.display: 奥尔基拉·伊德雷克斯是一个来自南提尔谷地的黄金龙裔，她在那里长大，培养了对治疗和火焰的热爱。在充满怪物、神灵、时间和多位面旅行、死亡、世界毁灭和拯救他人的奇怪生活之间，奥尔基拉存活了下来，并适应了处理任何情况，她的座右铭是“有问题就一个个来”。

description.original: Orkira leaps to a random enemy and attacks with a small AoE cone of fire.
description.display: 奥尔基拉跳向一名随机敌人，用锥形火焰造成小范围伤害。

longDescription.original: Orkira leaps to a random enemy and attacks with a small AoE cone of fire.
longDescription.display: 奥尔基拉跳向一名随机敌人，用锥形火焰造成小范围伤害。

description.original: Orkira summons The Phoenix to rain Elemental Fire down upon the battlefield. This deals damage and increases the Elemental Fire stacks.
description.display: 奥尔基拉召唤凤凰对战场降下元素火焰。此攻击会造成伤害，并增加元素火焰堆叠层数。

longDescription.original: Orkira flies up over the enemies, grasping The Domain of the Phoenix and uttering a prayer, summoning The Phoenix to rain Elemental Fire down upon the battlefield. This deals damage and increases the Elemental Fire stacks of affected enemies by 1 every 2 seconds for 10 seconds.
longDescription.display: 奥尔基拉从敌人头顶飞过，掌控凤凰领域并吟唱祈祷，召唤凤凰对战场降下元素火焰。此攻击会造成伤害，同时每 2 秒对受影响的敌人叠加 1 层元素火焰，持续10秒。

description.desc: Orkira heals all non-adjacent damaged Champions for $(amount) health per second.
奥尔基拉每秒为所有不相邻的受伤勇士回复 $(amount) 生命值。

tipText.original: Orkira heals non-adjacent Champions who are damaged.
tipText.display: 奥尔基拉治疗受伤的非相邻勇士。

description.desc: Whenever Orkira damages an enemy, they receive one stack of Elemental Fire, taking $(dot_percent)% of Orkira's damage per second for $(debuff_time_limit) seconds and receiving $(amount)% additional damage from all attacks. This ability stacks up to $(debuff_max_stacks) times (additively) and attempting to add another stack will reset the cooldown of all stacks.
奥尔基拉对一名敌人造成伤害时，会给该敌人附加一层元素火焰，使其每秒受到奥尔基拉伤害值 $(dot_percent)% 的伤害，持续 $(debuff_time_limit) 秒，并使其受到的所有攻击伤害提高 $(amount)%。此技能可以叠加 $(debuff_max_stacks) 次（加算），附加额外层数时会重置整个堆叠的冷却时间。

tipText.original: Orkira leaves a stacking debuff and DoT on enemies she damages.
tipText.display: 奥尔基拉在她伤害的敌人身上留下可堆叠的减益和持续伤害。

description.pre: Increase the effect of Elemental Fire by $(not_buffed amount___2)% for each order of magnitude worth of effective healing done with Lesser Restoration on the current run.
在当前关卡中，使用次级复原术造成的有效回复量每达到十的 n 次方，即提升元素火焰的效果 $(not_buffed amount___2)%。

description.desc: Increase the size of Orkira's Burning Hands AoE cone and have Elemental Fire apply two stacks instead of one.
提升奥尔基拉的燃烧之手造成范围伤害的角度，并使元素火焰造成两层堆叠而非一层。

specializationDescription.original: Orkira focuses on applying more stacks of Elemental Fire as quickly as possible.
specializationDescription.display: 奥尔基拉专注于尽快堆叠更多元素生物火焰层数。

description.desc: Increase the effect of Lesser Restoration by $(amount___2)%. Lesser Restoration will now "heal" undamaged Champions and Healing Flame will count $(amount)% of this non-effective healing as well.
提升次级复原术的效果 $(amount___2)%。次级复原术现在将“回复”未受到伤害的勇士，并且疗愈火焰也将把这些无效回复的 $(amount)% 回复量计算在内

specializationDescription.original: Orkira focuses on healing those who are injured, and even those who are not.
specializationDescription.display: 奥尔基拉专注于治愈伤者，甚至是没有受伤的人。

description.pre: If a Champion Orkira is able to heal (ie. non-adjacent) is about to take a killing blow, Orkira instantly swaps formation slots with that Champion for $(duration) seconds and takes the hit for them. During this time Orkira's overwhelm point is set to twice the other Champion's and neither Orkira or the other Champion can be moved, removed, or swapped out; after the time expires they swap back regardless of whether Orkira and/or the other Champion died during the time. This effect can only occur once every $(cooldown) seconds.
如果满足奥尔基拉回复条件的某位勇士（例如不与她相邻）即将被击杀，奥尔基拉会立即与该勇士互换在阵型中的位置并代替其承受该次伤害，持续 $(duration) 秒。在此期间奥尔基拉的击溃点数变为该勇士击溃点数的双倍，并且无论奥尔基拉或是该勇士都无法被移动、移除或替换出场。时间结束后双方交换回原本的位置，无论奥尔基拉和/或该勇士是否已在此期间死亡。此效果在 $(cooldown) 秒内仅能发动一次。

description.original: I'll stand with you, if you'll stand by me.
description.display: 只要你愿意，我会跟你并肩作战。

description.original: Here you go. You'll be up and about in no time!
description.display: 走你。你很快就能焕然一新恢复战斗力了！

description.original: Have you ever just watched fire? It's mesmerizing!
description.display: 你有细心观察过火焰吗？真的好迷人！

description.original: How can I explain... OH! I'll show you!
description.display: 我该怎么解释......噢！我展示给你看吧！

description.original: It gets rough sometimes, but you're way more important.
description.display: 有时情况会很艰难，但你更重要。

description.original: Nothing a little fire can't fix!
description.display: 没有什么东西是一点火解决不了的！

description.original: Catches you by surprise, doesn't it?
Change can be good? Right? Yeah. Yeah, this is good... Right?
description.display: 改变可以是好事？对吧？嗯。这是好事......对吧？

effects.description: Orkira also counts as a Half-Elf
Orkira also counts as an Aarakocra

description.original: Friends are like marshmallows, flammable and sweet.
description.display: 朋友就像棉花糖，易燃且甜蜜。

description.original: I won't let them harm you, no matter what it takes!
description.display: 无论付出什么代价，我都不会让他们伤害你的！

effects.description: Reduces the cooldown of Self Sacrifice by 15 seconds.

name.display: 翼爪鸟人变异奥尔基拉

name.original: Order of the White Robes Orkira

character_sheet_details.backstory: Orkira Illdrex is a gold dragonborn from the Nentir Vale, where she grew up nurturing a love of healing and fire. Between a strange life filled with monsters, Gods, time and multiplanar travel, death, the destruction of worlds and the saving of others, Orkira has survived and adapted to deal with any situation with a motto of 'One problem at a time.'
character_sheet_details.system_description: Orkira heals and buffs the party. She heals all non-adjacent damaged champions, while buffing all champions based on the magnitude of effective healing.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 奥尔基拉·伊德雷克斯是一个来自南提尔谷地的黄金龙裔，她在那里长大，培养了对治疗和火焰的热爱。在充满怪物、神灵、时间和多位面旅行、死亡、世界毁灭和拯救他人的奇怪生活之间，奥尔基拉存活了下来，并适应了处理任何情况，她的座右铭是“有问题就一个个来”。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 奥尔基拉能够治疗和强化队伍。她能治疗所有非相邻的受伤勇士，同时根据有效疗愈的量级，为所有勇士提供增益。
